endpoints.name: GET /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/compositeTypes

endpoints.name: PUT /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/compositeTypes/{compositeType}
endpoints.description: Updates a composite type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{COMPOSITETYPE}} with a real compositetype.

endpoints.name: DELETE /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/compositeTypes/{compositeType}
endpoints.description: Deletes a composite type.

endpoints.name: PATCH /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/compositeTypes/{compositeType}
endpoints.description: Patches a composite type.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{COMPOSITETYPE}} with a real compositetype.

endpoints.name: GET /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments
endpoints.description: Lists all deployments for a given project.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments
endpoints.description: Creates a deployment and all of the resources described by the deployment manifest.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}
endpoints.description: Gets information about a specific deployment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: PUT /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}
endpoints.description: Updates a deployment and all of the resources described by the deployment manifest.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: DELETE /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}
endpoints.description: Deletes a deployment and all of the resources in the deployment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: PATCH /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}
endpoints.description: Patches a deployment and all of the resources described by the deployment manifest.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: POST /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}/cancelPreview
endpoints.description: Cancels and removes the preview currently associated with the deployment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}/manifests
endpoints.description: Lists all manifests for a given deployment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}/manifests/{manifest}
endpoints.description: Gets information about a specific manifest.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{MANIFEST}} with a real manifest.

endpoints.name: GET /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}/resources
endpoints.description: Lists all resources in a given deployment.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}/resources/{resource}
endpoints.description: Gets information about a single resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{deployment}/stop
endpoints.description: Stops an ongoing operation. This does not roll back any work that has already been completed, but prevents any new work from being started.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DEPLOYMENT}} with a real deployment. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project.

endpoints.name: GET /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{resource}/getIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. May be empty if no such policy or resource exists.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{resource}/setIamPolicy
endpoints.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: POST /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/deployments/{resource}/testIamPermissions
endpoints.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{GOOGLEAPIS_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your GOOGLEAPIS ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{PROJECT}} with a real project. Replace {{RESOURCE}} with a real resource.

endpoints.name: GET /deploymentmanager/v2beta/projects/{project}/global/operations
